elasticsearch.domain.cognitooptions.Enab.Docs: Whether to enable or disable Amazon Cognito authentication for OpenSearch Dashboards. See [Amazon Cognito authentication for OpenSearch Dashboards](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/opensearch-service/latest/developerguide/cognito-auth.html).

elasticsearch.domain.cognitooptions.Iden.Docs: The Amazon Cognito identity pool ID that you want OpenSearch Service to use for OpenSearch Dashboards authentication.

elasticsearch.domain.cognitooptions.Role.Docs: The `AmazonESCognitoAccess` role that allows OpenSearch Service to configure your user pool and identity pool.

elasticsearch.domain.cognitooptions.User.Docs: The Amazon Cognito user pool ID that you want OpenSearch Service to use for OpenSearch Dashboards authentication.
